elements.name: Title
texts: The invasions of England and Ireland performed by John Speed, graven by Renold Elstrak

elements.name: Description
texts: A seventeenth-century political map of Ireland from 1603-1625 capturing Lough Derg and Purgatory

elements.name: Publisher
texts: Bibliothèque nationale de France, GE DD-6056 (1-4RES)

elements.name: Format
texts: 1 carte en 4 coupures ; chaque coupure 41 x 54, 5 cm
